import * as React from "react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const textareaTextarea = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    minHeight: "min-h-[60px]",
    width: "w-full",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
    borderWidth: ["border", "border-input"],
    backgroundColor: "bg-transparent",
    padding: ["px-3", "py-2"],
    fontSize: "text-base",
    boxShadow: "shadow-sm",
    placeholder: {
        color: "placeholder:text-muted-foreground",
    },
    "focus-visible": {
        outlineStyle: "focus-visible:outline-none",
        boxShadow: ["focus-visible:ring-1", "focus-visible:ring-ring"],
    },
    disabled: {
        cursor: "disabled:cursor-not-allowed",
        opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
    },
    md: {
        fontSize: "md:text-sm",
    },
});

const Textarea = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLTextAreaElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"textarea">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <textarea
      className={tw.join(textareaTextarea.class(), className)}
      ref={ref}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
Textarea.displayName = "Textarea"

export { Textarea }
